preflight_amendment: Before any model call, real native-Codex preflights showed that the outer macOS sandbox needed process-fork for runtime threads, the compatibility page-size sysctl used by Rust stack initialization, metadata-only visibility of the absent managed requirements path, a finite set of named macOS startup services, and the exact DNS/TLS services and public resolver files used by Codex's own macOS network policy. The package also needed to ship the registered runner source. Commit 8ce9f050176813c3014d50b847db43c1a0f833bb contains those bounded fixes. Every failed probe stopped before provider execution; a final network-denied diagnostic reached the expected network boundary with no other reported Seatbelt denial. The facts, answer schema, runner bytes, model, budgets, arms, rubric, and decision rule are unchanged.
purpose: Internal agent proxy for whether inherited Vela state reduces dead-route work and review burden.
same_information_rule: Both prompts are rendered by the registered runner from the same facts object. Treatment changes organization and typed state labels, not facts.
decision_rule: With n=1 per arm, publish raw results and no causal claim. Treatment is only directionally useful if it has no dead route, full downstream reuse, no lower rubric score, and no higher review burden; otherwise simplify the briefing.
